title: ScenarioSet
description: Schema for defining uncertainty spaces and plausible futures for DMDU/RDM decision evaluation. Allows explicit enumeration OR explicit generative definition. Prohibits enumeration-only mandates.

scenario_set_id.description: Unique identifier for this scenario set

uncertainty_drivers.description: The uncertainty dimensions that define the scenario space

definition_type.description: How scenarios are specified. ENUMERATED = explicit list, GENERATIVE = rule/algorithm that produces scenarios, HYBRID = some enumerated + some generated

specification.description: The actual definition — either a list reference, a generation rule, or a hybrid specification

scenario_count.description: Number of scenarios if known, or 'UNBOUNDED' for generative definitions

scenario_space_definition.description: The definition of the scenario space. Must be explicit but NOT limited to enumeration.

documentation_of_generation_context.description: How and why this scenario set was constructed. Must include methodological justification.

claim_strength.description: Evidence level for this scenario set's design choices

$comment: PROHIBITION: This schema explicitly does NOT require enumeration-only scenario definitions. Generative definitions are equally valid per DMDU/RDM literature.
